message:
fix(storage): enforce tombstone validation and remove dead helpers

Replace `issue_exists_in_tx` with `issue_status_in_tx` checks in
add_dependency, add_label, and remove_label to reject mutations on
tombstone issues with a clear Validation error. Remove the unreachable
`continue` in the retry loop and the now-unused `issue_exists_in_tx`
helper. Reformat `set_parent` signature and drop the unused
`DependencyType` import from update.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
